inputs.label: Total Carbohydrates
inputs.businessContext: Total carbohydrates in grams as listed on nutrition label

inputs.label: Dietary Fiber
inputs.businessContext: Dietary fiber in grams, subtracted from total carbs for net impact

inputs.label: Sugar Alcohols
inputs.businessContext: Sugar alcohols in grams, half are subtracted due to partial absorption

inputs.label: Protein
inputs.businessContext: Protein content in grams, contributes 4 kcal per gram

inputs.label: Fat
inputs.businessContext: Fat content in grams, contributes 9 kcal per gram
